meta.description: Single Source of Truth - Kanban Board for Closed-Loop Autonomous Development

session.goal: Довести Agent Nexus до Codex-first kimi-web-like interactive page на отдельном URL без ложного QEMU или PTY-переобещания.
session.meta_intent: Пользователь должен открывать session detail page, видеть честный хвост и replay сессии, переходить по dedicated GET URL в interactive mode и продолжать Codex session в браузере через стабильный runtime flow с published verification.

tasks.title: Создать deterministic fixture и verification harness
tasks.description: Подготовить воспроизводимый базис для всего interactive направления: fixture Codex artifact, fixture identity mapping, transport probe skeleton, artifact hash helper, backend test harness и frontend Playwright skeleton.
tasks.context: Коллективный review показал, что без fixture/bootstrap план остаётся roadmap, а не автономным SSOT. Почти все поздние green/red paths сейчас опираются на файлы и тесты, которых ещё нет.
tasks.meta_intent: Сделать все последующие задачи реально воспроизводимыми без скрытого ambient state и без ручного угадывания.
definition_of_done: Fixture layer exists for backend and frontend
Reproduction commands use real files and tests
success_criteria: Есть fixture Codex session artifact с реальным session id и user/assistant history
Есть helper для artifact hash before/after interactive run
Есть backend и Playwright harness для later tasks

green_paths.behavior_bdd: Given чистое repo state, When bootstrap fixture task выполняется, Then в репозитории появляются deterministic fixtures, helper scripts и базовые tests для interactive flow.

steps.action: Проверка fixture bootstrap на локальном репозитории

red_paths.behavior_bdd: Given отсутствует fixture root или fixture metadata повреждена, When bootstrap validation запускается, Then система падает честно с clear fixture error.

steps.action: Проверка graceful failure для broken fixture metadata

history.note: Fusion review promoted fixture/bootstrap as the real first task.

tasks.title: Выбрать Codex transport и зафиксировать ADR
tasks.description: Сравнить `codex exec resume --json` и `codex app-server`, выбрать primary transport и fallback policy, доказать выбор на fixture-backed session и выпустить transport ADR.
tasks.context: Review consensus: v1 должен быть Codex-native, но нельзя предполагать, что один transport гарантированно достаточен. Нужны primary path, fallback policy и реальный probe.
tasks.meta_intent: Убрать архитектурную неоднозначность и выбрать runtime surface, на котором можно честно построить browser continuation.
definition_of_done: Primary and fallback policy are explicit
Probe works on a fixture-backed session
success_criteria: Есть ADR с primary transport и fallback decision
Есть реальный probe result на fixture-backed session
План не обещает PTY или QEMU semantics

green_paths.behavior_bdd: Given fixture Codex session exists, When transport probe запускается в auto mode, Then система выбирает supported transport и возвращает structured support verdict.

steps.action: Проверка transport probe на реальной fixture session

red_paths.behavior_bdd: Given transport недоступен или session fixture невалидна, When probe запускается, Then система возвращает unsupported verdict и clear reason without fake success.

steps.action: Проверка unsupported transport verdict

tasks.title: Разрешить artifact-to-runtime session identity
tasks.description: Сделать явный mapping от `harness/artifact_id` к resumable Codex session or thread identity, включая mismatch handling, fallback resolution и persisted operational identity.
tasks.context: Один из strongest review points: dedicated URL у нас artifact-addressed, а Codex continuation runtime требует другой identity layer. Без него `/interactive` остаётся иллюзией.
tasks.meta_intent: Связать текущую detail-route identity с реальным Codex continuation target без мутации source artifact.
definition_of_done: Mismatch and fallback cases are tested
Operational identity is stored outside the source artifact
success_criteria: Можно детерминированно найти Codex runtime identity из artifact route
Broken or missing identity не приводит к silent failure
Source artifact не меняется during identity resolution

green_paths.behavior_bdd: Given valid artifact route and fixture rollout metadata, When identity resolution запускается, Then система возвращает stable resumable Codex identity.

steps.action: Проверка artifact-to-runtime identity resolution

red_paths.behavior_bdd: Given artifact metadata повреждена или runtime identity отсутствует, When identity resolution запускается, Then backend возвращает disabled interactive reason и no fake href.

steps.action: Проверка honest disabled identity state

history.note: Fusion review added this as a missing prerequisite task.

tasks.title: Определить interactive contract и boot payload
tasks.description: Зафиксировать JSON contract для interactive capability, dedicated route, boot payload, runtime status snapshot, disabled reasons и unsupported-harness fallback policy.
tasks.context: Несколько reviews сошлись на том, что current state_model нельзя просто перегрузить. Нужен отдельный contract boundary между detail page, interactive page и runtime supervisor.
tasks.meta_intent: Сделать `/interactive` route bootstrap deterministic и server-driven, а не client-side guesswork.
definition_of_done: Unsupported harness and disabled reasons are explicit
success_criteria: Есть поля `available`, `reason_disabled`, `transport`, `interactive_href`, `replay_available`, `runtime_status`
Dedicated interactive route bootstraps from one server payload
Other harnesses have honest fallback policy

green_paths.behavior_bdd: Given supported Codex artifact route, When interactive boot payload запрашивается, Then API возвращает one-shot payload with identity, route, replay availability and runtime snapshot.

steps.action: Проверка server-driven boot payload contract

red_paths.behavior_bdd: Given unsupported harness or disabled runtime capability, When boot payload запрашивается, Then API возвращает degraded read-only contract with explicit disabled reason and no broken boot guesswork.

steps.action: Проверка degraded boot payload

history.note: Fusion review added explicit boot contract boundary.

tasks.title: Построить replay snapshot и replay extraction
tasks.description: Извлечь artifact-derived tail snapshot и canonical replay log так, чтобы interactive page могла входить не в пустую сессию, а в continuity-preserving history layer.
tasks.context: Reviews отвергли идею, что `last 3 messages` достаточно. Нужны и tail snapshot для UX, и полный replay source для real continuation feel.
tasks.meta_intent: Сделать browser entry mode похожим на real continuation, а не на новый пустой чат с summary badge.
definition_of_done: Tail snapshot and replay extraction exist
No mutation happens to source artifact
success_criteria: Interactive page can show last 3 messages plus canonical replay source
Replay extraction preserves ordering
No-history sessions degrade honestly

green_paths.behavior_bdd: Given fixture session with history, When replay extraction запускается, Then system returns tail snapshot and canonical replay items in stable order.

steps.action: Проверка replay extraction and tail snapshot

red_paths.behavior_bdd: Given session without readable history, When replay extraction запускается, Then API returns empty-history contract without crashing composer boot.

steps.action: Проверка empty-history replay fallback

history.note: Tail snapshot was expanded into a real replay-source task.

tasks.title: Зафиксировать replay-to-live boundary и runtime status contract
tasks.description: Определить и реализовать boundary между replay phase и live continuation: `replay_started`, replay items, `replay_complete`, initial runtime status snapshot, runtime init failure semantics и no-duplication guarantees.
tasks.context: Это самый устойчивый gap across reviews. Kimi-web-like experience держится не на summary, а на честном переходе replay -> live.
tasks.meta_intent: Сделать момент перехода в live continuation понятным, стабильным и безопасным для browser UI.
definition_of_done: Replay success plus runtime init failure has honest degraded semantics
success_criteria: There is one canonical handoff from replay to live
UI can distinguish replay phase from runtime phase
Partial replay or init failure does not blank the page

green_paths.behavior_bdd: Given replay source and runtime transport are available, When interactive stream boots, Then replay completes first and only then live runtime status is exposed as ready.

steps.action: Проверка replay-to-live cutover semantics

red_paths.behavior_bdd: Given replay succeeds but runtime initialization fails, When interactive stream boots, Then page stays readable with replay content and explicit degraded runtime status.

steps.action: Проверка degraded state after replay success

history.note: Fusion review elevated replay-live rigor to a dedicated task.

tasks.title: Сделать operational state store с crash recovery и GC
tasks.description: Создать отдельное operational storage место для runtime state, resolved runtime identity, replay metadata, crash markers, TTL и garbage-collection rules без изменения source artifact.
tasks.context: Initial plan уже понимал separation, но review добавил crash recovery, orphan cleanup и persisted replay metadata как обязательные части.
tasks.meta_intent: Сохранить source artifact как truth прошлого и не потерять управляемость live continuation после disconnect или restart.
definition_of_done: Operational store is separate from the source artifact
Crash-recovery markers and GC rules exist
Artifact hash remains unchanged during runtime state writes
success_criteria: Operational state can survive reconnect and backend restart
Orphaned sessions are collectible
Source artifact stays immutable

green_paths.behavior_bdd: Given interactive runtime starts, When operational state is persisted, Then runtime metadata is written outside the artifact and artifact hash remains unchanged.

steps.setup_command: python3 scripts/prepare_interactive_fixture.py --output tmp/store-fixture && sha256sum tmp/store-fixture/session.jsonl > tmp/store-fixture/before.sha
steps.action: Проверка operational store separation and artifact immutability
steps.command: python3 -m pytest tests/test_interactive_store.py -k store_happy_path && sha256sum tmp/store-fixture/session.jsonl > tmp/store-fixture/after.sha && diff -u tmp/store-fixture/before.sha tmp/store-fixture/after.sha

red_paths.behavior_bdd: Given operational state root is unwritable, When runtime persistence begins, Then backend returns a clear store error and does not mutate the source artifact.

steps.action: Проверка graceful failure for unwritable state root

history.note: Crash recovery and GC were added to the operational layer task.

tasks.title: Поднять interactive supervisor и lifecycle rules
tasks.description: Сделать backend supervisor для per-session Codex continuation: start, stop, status, busy lock, single-writer policy, reconnect ownership, backend restart behavior и cleanup reason semantics.
tasks.context: Текущий app websocket не про per-session continuation. Reviews подчеркнули, что lifecycle and ownership rules должны быть first-class, а не побочным эффектом auth.
tasks.meta_intent: Дать browser interactive page настоящий runtime control plane, а не имитацию живого режима.
definition_of_done: Supervisor manages one runtime per interactive session
Busy, lock, reconnect and restart rules are explicit
Cleanup and crash behavior are observable
success_criteria: Single writer policy is enforced
Reconnect does not create duplicate writers
Supervisor restart or crash has an honest recovery behavior

green_paths.behavior_bdd: Given valid interactive session identity and supported transport, When supervisor starts, Then one managed runtime becomes available and emits lifecycle status updates.

steps.action: Проверка interactive supervisor lifecycle

red_paths.behavior_bdd: Given same interactive session already has an active writer, When another writer tries to attach, Then supervisor rejects it with a clear busy or ownership error.

steps.action: Проверка duplicate writer rejection

history.note: Lifecycle rules were strengthened with lock, reconnect and restart semantics.

tasks.title: Нормализовать browser event stream
tasks.description: Определить и реализовать normalized outbound event model для assistant text, reasoning, tool calls, command output, runtime status, degraded states, busy rejection и duplicate-event tolerance on reconnect.
tasks.context: Reviews сошлись: generic rendering допустим, но без stable ids, ordering guarantees и replay/live merge правил UI будет хрупким.
tasks.meta_intent: Сделать live browser timeline читаемым и устойчивым даже при reconnect и unknown event types.
definition_of_done: Stable ids and ordering guarantees exist
success_criteria: Replay + live merge keeps stable order
Unknown events degrade to safe generic blocks
Busy-session rejection becomes a UI-safe normalized event

green_paths.behavior_bdd: Given runtime emits reasoning, tool calls and command output, When browser stream reducer processes them, Then events keep stable order and correlation ids.

steps.action: Проверка event normalization with ordering guarantees

red_paths.behavior_bdd: Given runtime emits unknown event or reconnect duplicates, When reducer processes them, Then UI degrades safely instead of crashing or duplicating visible timeline irreparably.

steps.action: Проверка unknown and duplicate event tolerance

history.note: Event normalization was tightened with ids, order and duplicate tolerance.

tasks.title: Реализовать browser-to-runtime control actions
tasks.description: Сделать bidirectional action channel для prompt submit, cancel, approval response, question or request-user-input response и invalid-state handling when the session is busy.
tasks.context: One backend review explicitly pointed out the missing inbound side. Kimi-like continuation невозможен, если browser только читает stream, но не умеет отвечать runtime.
tasks.meta_intent: Сделать interactive page реально interactive, а не live log viewer.
definition_of_done: Prompt, cancel and approval paths are wired
Busy invalid-state errors are honest and recoverable
success_criteria: Browser can send a prompt and receive continuation output
Approval or user-input requests have a response path
Cancel and busy-state semantics are deterministic

green_paths.behavior_bdd: Given live interactive session is ready, When browser sends prompt and receives an approval or question flow, Then response roundtrip completes through the same control channel.

steps.action: Проверка browser-to-runtime action roundtrip

red_paths.behavior_bdd: Given session is busy or a control action is invalid, When browser sends a new action, Then backend returns a clear invalid-state response instead of silent failure.

steps.action: Проверка busy-state and invalid action handling

history.note: Fusion review added missing inbound interaction task.

tasks.title: Построить dedicated interactive route и frontend state machine
tasks.description: Сделать `/sessions/[harness]/[id]/interactive`, CTA с detail page и explicit frontend states: `loading_history`, `history_ready`, `connecting_runtime`, `live_ready`, `reconnecting`, `degraded_read_only`, `runtime_error`.
tasks.context: Frontend and Kimi-pattern reviews сошлись: route должен bootstrappиться server-side, не blank-screen-ить, и честно показывать degraded states и unsupported harness behavior.
tasks.meta_intent: Сделать direct GET URL first-class surface для real interactive continuation, а не hidden experimental panel.
definition_of_done: CTA and direct URL both work
Unsupported and degraded states are honest
success_criteria: User can open interactive route directly by URL
Page shows replay before or during live runtime boot
No blank screen appears on unsupported or degraded entry

green_paths.behavior_bdd: Given supported Codex detail page and boot payload, When user opens interactive route via CTA or direct URL, Then page renders history first and transitions into live-ready state.

steps.action: Проверка dedicated route and state machine happy path
steps.command: npx playwright test e2e/interactive-session.spec.ts --grep "interactive route history to live ready"

red_paths.behavior_bdd: Given unsupported harness or stale session boot, When user opens direct interactive URL, Then page renders degraded read-only mode with explicit reason instead of blank or broken state.

steps.action: Проверка degraded direct-entry behavior
steps.command: npx playwright test e2e/interactive-session.spec.ts --grep "interactive route degraded direct entry"

history.note: Interactive route task was rewritten around explicit browser states.

tasks.title: Добавить auth, ownership, resource limits и observability
tasks.description: Укрепить interactive route authorization, session ownership, second-writer policy, idle timeout, runtime limits, audit logs, per-session diagnostics, replay-live phase trace и cleanup reasons.
tasks.context: Reviews сошлись, что safety and auth нельзя отделять от runtime rules, а observability нужна для honest reproduction loops and published debugging.
tasks.meta_intent: Сделать interactive continuation безопасным и дебажимым на опубликованном URL, а не только локально впечатляющим.
definition_of_done: Resource limits and cleanup rules exist
success_criteria: Unauthorized interactive access is denied before runtime start
Idle or orphaned sessions are cleaned predictably
Failure diagnostics are discoverable from logs or status endpoints

green_paths.behavior_bdd: Given authenticated owner opens interactive route, When runtime starts and later reconnects, Then ownership, logs and status traces remain consistent.

steps.action: Проверка auth, ownership and diagnostics happy path

red_paths.behavior_bdd: Given unauthenticated client or second writer attempts access, When interactive start or websocket connect is requested, Then runtime does not start and backend records a clear rejection reason.

steps.action: Проверка unauthorized and second-writer rejection

history.note: Observability and resource rules were merged into the runtime safety layer.

tasks.title: Подтвердить local replay, reconnect и lifecycle proof
tasks.description: Добавить explicit local proof before deploy: route open, replay completes before composer unlock, prompt roundtrip, reconnect after partial stream, busy-session rejection, init error fallback и artifact immutability after interactive use.
tasks.context: Verification review чётко указал, что published verification слишком поздний этап без local smoke and lifecycle proof.
tasks.meta_intent: Зафиксировать, что browser continuation реально работает локально и не ломает source artifact ещё до published deploy.
definition_of_done: Local Playwright and backend lifecycle proofs exist
success_criteria: Replay and reconnect are locally verified
Busy and init-error states are locally verified
Artifact hash is unchanged after local interactive flow

green_paths.behavior_bdd: Given local app and fixture session are running, When Playwright opens interactive route and sends a prompt, Then replay completes before composer unlock and prompt roundtrip succeeds.

steps.setup_command: python3 scripts/start_local_interactive_fixture_stack.py --fixture tmp/local-proof && cd frontend && npm run build
steps.action: Проверка local interactive happy path and artifact immutability
steps.command: cd frontend && npx playwright test e2e/interactive-session.spec.ts --grep "local interactive happy path" && python3 ../scripts/check_artifact_hash_unchanged.py --fixture ../tmp/local-proof

red_paths.behavior_bdd: Given websocket drops during replay or a second prompt is sent while busy, When local interactive checks run, Then page degrades honestly and busy rejection is visible without hanging.

steps.setup_command: python3 scripts/start_local_interactive_fixture_stack.py --fixture tmp/local-proof --flaky-replay && cd frontend && npm run build
steps.action: Проверка local replay interruption and busy rejection
steps.command: cd frontend && npx playwright test e2e/interactive-session.spec.ts --grep "local replay reconnect and busy rejection"

history.note: Local proof was promoted to a dedicated pre-published gate.

tasks.title: Сделать published deploy proof для interactive route
tasks.description: Выполнить rebuild and republish, затем published verification через `make published-restore`, smoke, confidence, degraded-state checks, auth checks, reconnect checks, log capture и summary-path evidence.
tasks.context: Repo rules for major UI/runtime work требуют published proof. Reviews усилили это: нужны не только route smoke, но и confidence output, logs и honest degraded-state checks.
tasks.meta_intent: Дойти до состояния, когда пользователь реально видит working deployed interactive page на dedicated URL, а не локальный prototype.
definition_of_done: Published route smoke and confidence checks pass
Logs and summary paths are recorded
success_criteria: Published interactive route opens and shows replay/live progression
Published degraded and unauthorized states are honest
Smoke and confidence summary paths are stored as evidence

green_paths.behavior_bdd: Given published stack is restored, When Playwright opens a valid interactive route, Then the page renders replay, reaches live-ready or honest runtime state, and published diagnostics capture smoke and confidence summaries.

steps.action: Проверка published interactive happy path with recorded evidence
steps.command: cd frontend && npx playwright test e2e/published-url.spec.ts --grep "published interactive route works"

red_paths.behavior_bdd: Given published runtime cannot start or websocket drops after replay, When published interactive checks run, Then page stays readable with explicit degraded reason, unauthorized access is denied, and failure evidence is visible in smoke, confidence and logs.

steps.action: Проверка published degraded, unauthorized and reconnect failure modes
steps.command: cd frontend && npx playwright test e2e/published-url.spec.ts --grep "published interactive degraded and unauthorized states"

history.note: Published gate was strengthened with restore, confidence, logs and degraded-state evidence.
